description:
Migrate helixir's npm release pipeline from semantic-release to @changesets/cli + changesets/action@v1, following the exact patterns documented in PUBLISHING.md (the org-wide release standard authored by the helix team).

Read PUBLISHING.md in the repo root before starting — it is the source of truth for this migration.

---

## Package Structure

helixir publishes ONE package to npm: `helixir` (the root package, already at v0.1.0).

The workspace packages in packages/ (`@helixir/core`, `@helixir/github-action`) are INTERNAL dependencies — they are NOT published to npm separately. They must go in the `ignore` list in .changeset/config.json.

No `linked` array needed. No `@helixir` npm scope. Just `helixir`.

---

## How Changesets Work (Two-Step Dance — CRITICAL)

Publishing is ALWAYS two merges to main:

```
Step 1: Feature PR merges to main (with .changeset/*.md file)
         → publish.yml fires, sees pending changeset
         → creates "chore: version packages" PR
         → does NOT publish yet

Step 2: Merge the version PR
         → publish.yml fires again, no changesets remain
         → runs `changeset publish`
         → helixir goes to npm
         → git tag created
```

This is expected behavior, not a bug.

---

## What to implement

### 1. Install @changesets/cli
```
pnpm add -D @changesets/cli
```

### 2. Create .changeset/config.json
Single published package, workspace packages ignored:
```json
{
  "$schema": "https://unpkg.com/@changesets/config@3.1.2/schema.json",
  "changelog": "@changesets/cli/changelog",
  "commit": false,
  "fixed": [],
  "linked": [],
  "access": "public",
  "baseBranch": "main",
  "updateInternalDependencies": "patch",
  "ignore": ["@helixir/core", "@helixir/github-action"]
}
```

### 3. Create .changeset/README.md
Brief contributor guide: run `npx changeset`, select `helixir`, choose bump type (patch/minor/major), commit the generated file with your changes.

### 4. Replace .github/workflows/release.yml with .github/workflows/publish.yml
Delete release.yml. Create publish.yml using pnpm:

```yaml
name: Publish

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

permissions:
  contents: write
  pull-requests: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  publish:
    name: Publish to npm
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: '>=9'

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Build
        run: pnpm run build

      - name: Version and Publish
        uses: changesets/action@v1
        with:
          publish: pnpm run changeset:publish
          version: pnpm run changeset:version
          commit: 'chore: version packages'
          title: 'chore: version packages'
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
          NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE: 'true'
          HUSKY: '0'
```

HUSKY: '0' is REQUIRED (PUBLISHING.md Bug 1) — prevents husky pre-push hooks from running during CI git operations.

### 5. Update root package.json scripts
Add:
```json
"changeset": "changeset",
"changeset:version": "changeset version",
"changeset:publish": "changeset publish"
```
Remove: "release" and "release:dry-run"
Fix: "prepublishOnly": "pnpm run build" (no tests — tests run in CI)

### 6. Add changeset CI gate
helixir has separate CI workflow files (no quality-gates aggregate). Add .github/workflows/changeset.yml:

```yaml
name: Changeset Required

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev, staging]

jobs:
  changeset:
    name: Changeset Required
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 2
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Check for changeset
        run: |
          LABELS='${{ toJson(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name) }}'
          if echo "$LABELS" | grep -q "skip-changeset"; then
            echo "Label 'skip-changeset' found — bypassing."
            exit 0
          fi
          CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only "origin/${{ github.base_ref }}...HEAD" \
            | grep '^\.changeset/.*\.md$' | grep -v 'README\.md' || true)
          if [ -z "$CHANGED" ]; then
            echo "::error::No changeset found. Run: npx changeset"
            echo "Or add label 'skip-changeset' for infra-only changes."
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Changeset found: $CHANGED"
```

### 7. Remove semantic-release devDependencies
Remove from root package.json then run pnpm install:
- semantic-release
- @semantic-release/changelog
- @semantic-release/commit-analyzer
- @semantic-release/git
- @semantic-release/github
- @semantic-release/npm
- @semantic-release/release-notes-generator
- conventional-changelog-conventionalcommits

### 8. Delete .releaserc.json

### 9. Verify root package.json fields (PUBLISHING.md Part 6 checklist)
- "files" array includes only what consumers need (not src/, tests, etc.)
- "exports" map is correct — verify with `npm pack --dry-run`
- "repository.url" is correct
- "homepage" is correct
- "bugs" field is correct

### 10. Create initial changeset for pending unreleased work
Create .changeset/release-pipeline-migration.md:
```markdown
---
"helixir": minor
---

Migrate release pipeline from semantic-release to changesets. Add Zod schema validation for design token files. Various tool improvements and bug fixes since v0.1.0.
```

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] .changeset/config.json exists — single package `helixir`, workspace packages in `ignore`
- [ ] .github/workflows/publish.yml exists using changesets/action@v1 with HUSKY: '0'
- [ ] .github/workflows/release.yml is deleted
- [ ] .github/workflows/changeset.yml exists (CI gate for PRs)
- [ ] .releaserc.json is deleted
- [ ] root package.json has changeset, changeset:version, changeset:publish scripts
- [ ] All @semantic-release/* packages removed from devDependencies
- [ ] pnpm-lock.yaml updated
- [ ] .changeset/release-pipeline-migration.md exists referencing `helixir` only
- [ ] .changeset/README.md exists
- [ ] root package.json fields verified (files, exports, homepage, repository, bugs)
- [ ] CI passes on the PR
title: Migrate release pipeline to changesets (PUBLISHING.md standard)

descriptionHistory.description:
Migrate helixir's npm release pipeline from semantic-release to @changesets/cli + changesets/action@v1, following the exact patterns documented in PUBLISHING.md (the org-wide release standard authored by the helix team).

Read PUBLISHING.md in the repo root before starting — it is the source of truth for this migration.

---

## Context

helixir is a MONOREPO with three publishable packages:
- `helixir` (root — the CLI/MCP server, already published at v0.1.0)
- `@helixir/core` (packages/core — workspace package, v0.1.0)
- `@helixir/github-action` (packages/github-action — workspace package, v0.1.0)

IMPORTANT: The `@helixir` npm scope must be registered on npmjs.com by the repo owner BEFORE the workspace packages can publish. The root `helixir` package is already registered. This is a prerequisite that CANNOT be automated — note it prominently in the PR description.

---

## How Changesets Work (Two-Step Dance — CRITICAL)

Publishing is ALWAYS two merges to main. The agent implementing this must understand this:

```
Step 1: Feature PR merges to main (with .changeset/*.md file)
         → publish.yml fires, sees pending changeset
         → creates "chore: version packages" PR
         → does NOT publish yet

Step 2: Merge the version PR
         → publish.yml fires again, no changesets remain
         → runs `changeset publish`
         → packages go to npm
         → git tags created
```

This is expected behavior, not a bug.

---

## What to implement

### 1. Install @changesets/cli
```
pnpm add -D @changesets/cli
```

### 2. Create .changeset/config.json
Three packages, linked so they always version together:
```json
{
  "$schema": "https://unpkg.com/@changesets/config@3.1.2/schema.json",
  "changelog": "@changesets/cli/changelog",
  "commit": false,
  "fixed": [],
  "linked": [["helixir", "@helixir/core", "@helixir/github-action"]],
  "access": "public",
  "baseBranch": "main",
  "updateInternalDependencies": "patch",
  "ignore": []
}
```

Note: If any workspace package should NOT be published, add it to "ignore" instead. Check each package.json for `"private": true`.

### 3. Create .changeset/README.md
Brief contributor guide explaining: run `npx changeset`, select affected packages, choose bump type (patch/minor/major), commit the generated file with your changes.

### 4. Replace .github/workflows/release.yml with .github/workflows/publish.yml
Delete release.yml. Create publish.yml using pnpm (helixir uses pnpm, not npm):

```yaml
name: Publish

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

permissions:
  contents: write
  pull-requests: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  publish:
    name: Publish to npm
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: '>=9'

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Build
        run: pnpm run build

      - name: Version and Publish
        uses: changesets/action@v1
        with:
          publish: pnpm run changeset:publish
          version: pnpm run changeset:version
          commit: 'chore: version packages'
          title: 'chore: version packages'
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
          NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE: 'true'
          HUSKY: '0'
```

HUSKY: '0' is REQUIRED (PUBLISHING.md Bug 1) — prevents husky pre-push hooks from running inside CI git operations.

### 5. Add changeset scripts to root package.json
Add:
```json
"changeset": "changeset",
"changeset:version": "changeset version",
"changeset:publish": "changeset publish"
```
Remove: "release" and "release:dry-run"
Fix: "prepublishOnly": "pnpm run build" (remove any test step — tests run in CI)

### 6. Add changeset CI gate
helixir has separate CI workflow files (no quality-gates aggregate job). Add a new file `.github/workflows/changeset.yml` that gates PRs requiring a changeset:

```yaml
name: Changeset Required

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev, staging]

jobs:
  changeset:
    name: Changeset Required
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 2
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Check for changeset
        run: |
          LABELS='${{ toJson(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name) }}'
          if echo "$LABELS" | grep -q "skip-changeset"; then
            echo "Label 'skip-changeset' found — bypassing."
            exit 0
          fi
          CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only "origin/${{ github.base_ref }}...HEAD" \
            | grep '^\.changeset/.*\.md$' | grep -v 'README\.md' || true)
          if [ -z "$CHANGED" ]; then
            echo "::error::No changeset found. Run: npx changeset"
            echo "Or add label 'skip-changeset' for infra-only changes."
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Changeset found: $CHANGED"
```

Note: This gate should only fail for PRs that touch source code. If you want to skip it for CI/config-only PRs, add a paths filter or rely on the skip-changeset label.

### 7. Remove semantic-release devDependencies
Remove from root package.json and run pnpm install to update lockfile:
- semantic-release
- @semantic-release/changelog
- @semantic-release/commit-analyzer
- @semantic-release/git
- @semantic-release/github
- @semantic-release/npm
- @semantic-release/release-notes-generator
- conventional-changelog-conventionalcommits

### 8. Delete .releaserc.json

### 9. Verify package.json fields (PUBLISHING.md Part 6 checklist)
Check ALL three package.json files (root + packages/core + packages/github-action):
- "files" array includes only what consumers need — NOT src/, tests, .changeset/, etc.
- "exports" map is correct — verify with `npm pack --dry-run` in each package directory
- "repository.url" points to correct GitHub repo
- "homepage" is set correctly (currently root has GitHub URL — verify this is intentional)
- "bugs" field is correct

### 10. Create initial changeset for pending unreleased work
Since commits exist on main since v0.1.0 that have never been published, create:

`.changeset/release-pipeline-migration.md`:
```markdown
---
"helixir": minor
"@helixir/core": minor
"@helixir/github-action": minor
---

Migrate release pipeline from semantic-release to changesets. Add Zod schema validation for design token files. Various tool improvements and bug fixes.
```

This will trigger the version PR on the next push to main.

---

## Known Manual Prerequisite (Human Action Required)

Before workspace packages (@helixir/core, @helixir/github-action) can publish:
1. Register the `@helixir` npm scope on npmjs.com (Account → Organizations or Packages)
2. Ensure NPM_TOKEN in GitHub secrets has write access to the @helixir scope
3. The root `helixir` package (no scope) is already set up — that part will work immediately

Call this out prominently in the PR description so Jake knows to action it.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] .changeset/config.json exists with correct three-package linked config
- [ ] .github/workflows/publish.yml exists using changesets/action@v1 with HUSKY: '0'
- [ ] .github/workflows/release.yml is deleted
- [ ] .github/workflows/changeset.yml exists (CI gate for PRs)
- [ ] .releaserc.json is deleted
- [ ] root package.json has changeset, changeset:version, changeset:publish scripts
- [ ] All @semantic-release/* packages removed from devDependencies
- [ ] pnpm-lock.yaml updated (run pnpm install after dependency changes)
- [ ] .changeset/release-pipeline-migration.md exists with all three packages listed
- [ ] .changeset/README.md exists
- [ ] package.json fields verified (files, exports, homepage, repository, bugs)
- [ ] PR description clearly states the @helixir npm scope prerequisite for workspace packages
- [ ] CI passes on the PR

Read PUBLISHING.md in the repo root before starting — it is the source of truth for this migration.
